description: Style Note No chance of making a fashion faux pas when you're carrying the wallet from Reid and Taylor clean, classic styling made of genuine, understated leather, this piece would also make a great gift. Featuring multiple card slots, this sleek wallet offers unbeatable practical style. Product Details Caramel brown purse style wallet Has a flap with an id holder inside One main compartment with a slip pocket Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 10 cm x 6 cm
